'''Dinlo''' was a forest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dinlo system/Legends|Dinlo system]]. It was the site of a rescue mission undertaken by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] to rescue a thousand [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
